The charcoal box is at cols 11-15, and the W-box is at cols 20-22. They're separated.
It seems like the charcoal box restored itself when the W-box moved away. The W-box is now to the right of the charcoal box, near the purple bar.
I overshot. I need to move the W-box back to the left to enter the charcoal box. From cols 20-22, I need LEFT x6 to get to cols 12-14 (the interior).
But wait, I need to reconsider the goal. Maybe the goal isn't to put the W-box inside the charcoal box. Let me think about what the game might be asking.
Looking at the two panels:
- Left panel: charcoal box with white interior, W-box (green frame, white center)
- Right panel: charcoal box with white interior, B-box (green frame, black center)
The W-box has a white center, and the charcoal boxes have white interiors. The B-box has a black center. Maybe the goal is to match the center color with the interior color? The W-box's white center matches the white interior, so it should go in one of the charcoal boxes.
But the B-box has a black center, and the charcoal boxes have white interiors. So maybe the B-box shouldn't go in a charcoal box? Or maybe there's a different target for the B-box.
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the right panel. The right charcoal box has a distorted boundary `[[26, 44], [26, 48], [30, 48], [30, 45], [29, 44]]`. This suggests the B-box has already partially entered or damaged it. The B-box is at rows 30-32, cols 42-44, and the charcoal box is at rows 26-30, cols 44-48. The B-box's top-right corner overlaps with the charcoal box's bottom-left corner.
Maybe the goal is:
1. Place the W-box inside the left charcoal box (matching white center with white interior)
2. The B-box is already "placed" on the right charcoal box (or needs to be placed there)
Let me try moving the W-box to the left charcoal box interior. From cols 20-22, I need LEFT x6 to get to cols 12-14. But I also need to make sure the W-box is at the right rows. Currently at rows 33-35, which matches the charcoal box interior rows 33-35.
So: LEFT x6 to get to cols 12-14.
